title: Flower Bouquet Building Set, 1464 PCS Botanical Collection Building Block Toy, Rose Sunflower Home Plant Decor, 18 Flowers Models Birthday Gift for Adults Women Kids Boys Girls 8 9 10 11 12+
features: VIVID AND DIVERSE BLOOMS - PLAXSOON flower bouquet building set boasts a refreshing and lively color, with bright, vivid hues and intricately designed flower shapes inspired by real blossoms. This flower set includes 18 different flowers, such as roses, sunflowers, hibiscus, tulips, lilies, carnations, jasmine, chrysanthemums, white clover, kapok, snapdragons, lavender, saffron, and camellias etc, creating a visually stunning experience that brings the vibrant beauty of nature into your home

UNIQUE DISPLAY COLLECTION - Perfect for both home and office decor, this flower bouquet set adds a touch of warmth and elegance to any room. Unlike real flowers, this flower botanical collection is a long-lasting decoration that remains vibrant and attractive year-round, making any occasion more special. Pay ATTENTION: This flower building toy NOT includes a vase

ENDLESS DIY POSSIBILITIES - This botanical collection building set empowers you to freely design and arrange each flower, offering adjustable shapes and heights to create a bouquet that's uniquely yours. Whether you’re following the detailed manual or letting your creativity flow, this set of flower allows you to customize your floral arrangement to suit any occasion

1464 PCS PREMIUM QUALITY BRICKS - The flower plant building toy includes 1464 pcs building blocks made from high-quality ABS material. Each block is designed with advanced color processing to ensure vibrant, long-lasting hues that won't fade over time. The bricks are precision-engineered for a secure fit, free from burrs and sharp edges, providing a high-quality, enjoyable building experience for adults, teens, and kids boys girls 8-12+

PERFECT GIFT CHOICE - PLAXSOON flowers bouquet makes a unique and thoughtful gift for loved ones, mothers, lovers, girlfriends, families and friends, representing eternal beauty and love. Whether for Christmas, birthday, thanksgiving day, valentine's day, mother's day or anniversaries, this bouquet building brick set is a meaningful and lasting present that will delight anyone who receives it
description: Product Description PLAXSOON bouquet of flower building set brings the vibrant beauty of nature into your home with its refreshing and lively colors! Unleash Your Creativity with PLAXSOON Flower Bouquet Building Blocks Mix and match different flowers to create your own stunning arrangements. Choose your favorite blooms and pair them with any vase you like to craft unique floral displays. PLEASE NOTE: Vase not included Adjustable Petals Adjustable Height Adjustable Leaves PLAXSOON flower plant building set make the perfect gift for any occasion! Whether it’s Christmas, birthday, Thanksgiving, Valentine’s Day, Mother’s Day, or an anniversary, this unique and thoughtful gift symbolizes eternal beauty and love. Great for mothers, lovers, friends, and family. This bouquet building brick is more than just a present，it's a lasting memory that will brighten their day and their home. Make your gift stand out with a creation that’s as timeless as the sentiments it represents. PLAXSOON Flower Bouquet Botanical Collection Building Block Set Gift for Adults Women Kids 8 9 10 11 12+ Featuring 18 intricately designed flowers, including roses, sunflowers, tulips, lilies, carnations, jasmine, and more, each bloom is inspired by real-life blossoms, showcasing bright, vivid hues that create a visually stunning display. This bouquet is a perfect way to add a touch of natural elegance to any space.
